title: Monetdb Crashes on INSERT statement after ALTER statement in another connection
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE testMixedTypes (id Int32, name String, amount Decimal(10, 2), created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
ALTER TABLE testMixedTypes ADD COLUMN description String;
UPDATE testMixedTypes SET description = 'This is item 1' WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: INSERT after ALTER causes Monetdb crash
